title: The Palace Becomes the Final Stage
description: Pages 6–10 focus on the palace becomes the final stage, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as doflamingo's officers prepare for decisive fights as the rebellion spreads and the final path to Doflamingo narrows.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Get your hands off Bellamy! Mingo!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You promised me, didn't you, straw hat-ya!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: If you get carried away by anger or hate, you're playing right into his hands!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Control your- self! provoking people is what he does best!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Think of losing your cool here as tantamount to losing your life!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Remem- her...that's exactly what happened to me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Doflamingo is a cruel, heartless man.

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: He's always searching for the tiniest flaw to sink his claws into!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Behehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehehe! That was so precious my shot's just flying out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He kicked it! Hey...heeey, he kicked it, didn't he?! what a dummy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: That's not the case at all. It's just that I've finally reached my boiling point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: think about everything you two have done to me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: On punk hazard, you began with the destruction-tion of sad,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: And here on Dressrosa you freed all of my toys!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Even now your crew is going after the smile factory!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: I've gone beyond the point of anger! Now all I can do is simply laugh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Now here you are, putting a cherry on top of the whole thing by trying to take my head!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: You guys are the proverbial straw that broke this camels' back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: It's almost as if I'm tasting my depression from 13 years ago all over again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: I wouldn't be standing before you today, like this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: You'd have become the 3rd Corazon and would have been right by my side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Oi! The hell are you doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat-ya! He's being con- trolled!

summary: The Palace Becomes the Final Stage develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
